newEvidence: Observable fact unavailable or unresolved when the specification was locked
lockedSurface: Decision IDs, promises, flows, contracts, files, and gates affected
noChangeConsequence: Concrete user/system harm, missed value, or constraint violation if the lock remains unchanged
productAlignment: How the change advances the accepted promise and north star without adding an excluded promise
expectedBenefit: Measured value or low/medium/high/unknown with evidence and uncertainty
fullChangeCost: Design, implementation, migration, compatibility, revalidation, documentation, support, rollout, rollback, and cognitive cost
blastRadius: Direct and transitive contracts, hosts, evidence, and decisions invalidated
reversibility: Rollback path and any one-way consequences
revalidationPlan: Validators and contract tests to rerun
Migration, compatibility, release, and rollback gates
recommendation: Why net value is positive at the stated confidence and why this is the narrowest sufficient delta
